svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam activity {
 BackgroundColor #EAF4FB
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 DiamondBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
 DiamondBorderColor #F57F17
 StartColor #1F4E79
 EndColor #1E7145
 FontSize 12
 ArrowColor #1F4E79
}
skinparam note {
 BackgroundColor #FFFDE7
 BorderColor #F9A825
}
skinparam ArrowColor #1F4E79

title Activity Diagram — crawlPageWithRetry(task, attempt)\nRuns inside EACH worker thread simultaneously

|Worker Thread|
start

:Receive UrlTask\n(url, depth, attempt=0);

if (pageCount >= maxPages\nOR stopped == true?) then (yes)
 :Return null\n(skip this task);
 stop
endif

if (depth > maxDepth?) then (yes)
 :Return null\n(too deep — skip);
 stop
endif

note right
 Guard conditions checked
 BEFORE doing any network work.
 This prevents wasted HTTP calls.
end note

:Thread.sleep(politenessDelayMs);
note right
 POLITENESS DELAY:
 Prevents hammering the server
 with too many rapid requests.
 Configurable: 0–5000ms
end note

' ── STAGE 2: HTTP Fetch
|Worker Thread|
:Record t0 = System.currentTimeMillis();
:Jsoup.connect(url)\n .userAgent(\"JavaWebCrawler/1.0\")\n .timeout(timeoutMs)\n .followRedirects(true)\n .get();

if (IOException or Timeout?) then (yes)

 note right
 RETRY LOGIC (Phase 2):
 Network errors are often
 temporary — worth one retry
 end note

 if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES\n(attempt < 1)?) then (yes)
 :Log warning message;
 :crawlPageWithRetry(task, attempt+1);
 note right: Recursive retry call
 if (Retry succeeded?) then (yes)
 :Proceed with result;
 else (no)
 :Return Error CrawledPage\n(statusCode=0, message=error);
 stop
 endif
 else (no — all retries used)
 :Log error message;
 :pageCount.incrementAndGet();
 :Return Error CrawledPage\n(statusCode=0, message=error);
 stop
 endif

endif

:fetchTime = now - t0;

note right
 STAGE 2 complete.
 We now have the raw HTML document.
end note

' ── STAGE 3: Data Extraction
:Record tExtract = now;

:title = doc.title();
:desc = doc.selectFirst(\"meta[name=description]\");

:Select all <a href=\"...\"> elements;

repeat

 :Get absolute URL: a.absUrl(\"href\");
 if (isValidUrl(href)?) then (yes)
 :Add href to links list;
 if (depth < maxDepth\nAND pageCount < maxPages?) then (yes)
 :visitedUrls.add(href);
 note right
 ATOMIC CHECK+INSERT:
 Returns true only if URL
 was NOT already visited.
 Prevents duplicate crawls.
 end note
 if (add() returned true\n(URL is new)?) then (yes)
 :queue.offer(\n new UrlTask(href, depth+1));
 note right
 BFS: add to queue
 for next wave of crawling
 end note
 endif
 endif
 endif

repeat while (more <a> tags?)

:stageExtractionMs += (now - tExtract);
note right
 STAGE 3 complete.
 We have extracted all data.
end note

:pageCount.incrementAndGet();
note right
 AtomicInteger: safe to call
 from multiple threads at once.
 No race condition possible.
end note

:Return new CrawledPage(\n url, title, desc, links,\n statusCode=200, fetchTime, depth\n);

|CrawlerEngine (Main Loop)|
:saveAndNotify(page);
:Notify GUI callback;
:Write to CSV + JSON + SQLite;

stop
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="HDwSmDTa_OjxVkMHbnbk-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="2551" width="969" x="270" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
